Plan explanation:
- First, determine the nearest target from the current Spot position (0.0, 0.0) and heading (0.0). The nearest target is goal_1. 
- Rotate Spot toward goal_1, which is 150 degrees away from the current heading.
- Move Spot 1 meter forward along the new heading.
- Face goal_1 to ensure Spot is aligned with the target.
- Rotate Spot toward goal_2, which is 105 degrees away from the direction toward goal_1.
- Move Spot 1 meter forward along the new heading.
- Face goal_2 to ensure Spot is aligned with the target.
- Rotate Spot toward the x-axis (90 degrees) to move to the next target.
- Move Spot 1 meter forward along the new heading.
- Face the next target to ensure Spot is aligned with it.
- Repeat this process until all targets have been visited.
- If an obstacle is detected ahead, call the LLM to replan.
